creator: rjb@robertjbrown.com
text:
Here is a new board to add to the supported list for FreeBSD amd64.

Manufacturer: Tyan
Model: S5220 Toledo q35T
Northbridge: Intel Q35 / Socket LGA775
Submitter: rjb@robertjbrown.com
Notes:

All on-board devices supported, but only as of 7.0-CURRENT. On-board PATA/IDE controller support was only added as a patch to 7.0 in this commit: http://svn.freebsd.org/viewvc/base/stable/7/sys/dev/ata/ata-chipset.c?view=log&pathrev=184442


The dmesg and pciconf output are attached in the same file.

Fix: N/A

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: N/A
